title: Jigariyaa
subTitle: Shaamu, who lives a carefree life, falls in love with a well-educated girl, Raadha. However, circumstances force the young couple to part ways.

title: Imaandaar
subTitle: Things turn awry when a businessman, unaware of the truth, allows his pampered daughter to get engaged to the son of his old rival.

title: Banjaran
subTitle: The universe offers a Banjara tribe leader's daughter an opportunity to turn her doomed love story into a happily-ever-after with her soulmate.

title: Bazaar
subTitle: Najma is in love with Akhtar but cannot marry him until he is financially stable. An elderly Shakir promises to help Akhtar set up his business in exchange for Najma finding a suitable bride for him.

title: Mandi
subTitle: Rukmini Bai runs a brothel that is visited by some of the most prominent men in the society. However, when one of the prostitutes has an illicit affair, the establishment is put at risk.

title: Dil Ka Rishta
subTitle: Jai, a wealthy businessman in love with Tia, accidentally kills her husband in a car crash. After the accident Tia loses her memory and falls for Jai, who struggles with guilt.

title: Bhumika: The Role
subTitle: Urvashi who becomes an actress with the help of Keshav, ends up marrying him. However, things complicate when she indulges in affairs with prominent men in the film industry.

title: Pakeezah
subTitle: Sahibjaan, a young courtesan, falls in love with Salim. The two wish to marry, but the nature of her profession keeps casting a dark shadow over their plans.

title: Satta
subTitle: Anuradha relocates to Mumbai where she meets Vivek, an aspiring politician, and marries him. Things take a turn when he is arrested for murder and she has to take his place in the upcoming elections.

title: Kya Kehna
subTitle: A young university student's world is rocked when her brief involvement with a wealthy playboy results in her pregnancy.

title: Amba
subTitle: When Amba gets her son Rajendra arrested for sexually assaulting their servant's daughter, Rajendra's wife wreaks havoc into their lives as she vows to avenge him.

title: Amba
subTitle: When Amba gets her son Rajendra arrested for sexually assaulting their servant's daughter, Rajendra's wife wreaks havoc into their lives as she vows to avenge him.

title: Main Tulsi Tere Aangan Ki
subTitle: A wife embraces her husband's illegitimate son as her own in honour of the other woman's memory. However, as time progresses, this starts to seem like a big mistake.

title: Sau Din Saas Ke
subTitle: Durga marries Prakash, unaware of his mother Bhawani Devi's dominating and abusive nature. She later insists on moving in with his family in order to teach Bhawani Devi a lesson.

title: Masoom
subTitle: D K Malhotra leads a peaceful life with his wife and two daughters. But all of this changes when he is forced to bring a boy, who is his son from a previous relationship, home after his mother dies.

title: Firaaq
subTitle: In the aftermath of Gujarat's violent 2002 riots, victims find their lives changed forever and reel from the deep impact the upheaval left on them.

title: Doli Saja Ke Rakhna
subTitle: Inder and Pallavi fall for each other but her three possessive brothers hate him. Resultantly, the couple elopes but they soon find themselves missing their families and decide to return.

title: Ghar Sansar
subTitle: When Prakash's father dies, he is forced to shoulder the financial responsibilities of his large family. However, his troubles increase when his younger brother leaves him home to join a gang.

title: International Crook
subTitle: Rajesh, the superintendent of the police, is happy to meet his old friend, Shekar, in Goa, unaware that he is a smuggler, who is involved in a spree of illegal activities.

title: Surkhaab
subTitle: Jeet, a former judo champion, decides to travel to Canada in search of employment. However, since she has no money, she seeks the help of a local man who ends up cheating her.

title: Raja Hindustani
subTitle: Raja, a taxi driver, falls in love with Aarti, a rich girl and marries her against her parents' wishes. Later, her stepmother tries to create differences between the couple.

title: Udhaar Ki Zindagi
subTitle: Sitaram refuses to accept his son Vasudev's marriage to Suman. Years later, he eagerly awaits their return from the USA but is left disheartened when his granddaughter Sita turns up alone.

title: Udhaar Ki Zindagi
subTitle: Sitaram refuses to accept his son Vasudev's marriage to Suman. Years later, he eagerly awaits their return from the USA but is left disheartened when his granddaughter Sita turns up alone.

title: 3 Deewarein
subTitle: While filming a documentary in a prison, Chandrika comes across three unique stories and, somewhere in between, finds what her heart has been seeking.

title: Avtaar
subTitle: Avtaar leads a happy life with his wife, Radha, and his sons, Chander and Ramesh. However, consumed by their greed and ambitions, Avtaar's sons betray him but he soon reaches new heights of success.

title: Amrit
subTitle: A widowed man and woman face abuse from their respective children and seek comfort from each other instead.

title: Nishant
subTitle: After his wife Rukmini is abducted by his cruel brother, Vishwam is forced to confront the deep-rooted issues of power and control that plague their village, leading to tragic consequences.

title: Haan Maine Bhi Pyaar Kiya
subTitle: Pooja divorces her husband for being unfaithful and gets a job as secretary to a film star. The two fall in love, before her ex-husband returns and she finds herself confused between the two men.

title: Katha
subTitle: Rajaram, a middle-class clerk, is secretly in love with his neighbour, Sandhya, but is too shy to disclose his love. However, he is taken aback when his smooth-talking friend soon woos Sandhya.

title: Chalta Hai Yaar
subTitle: Frustrated with his wife, Namdev, a businessman, decides to end his life. However, things take a turn when he envisions his dead father who encourages him to rethink his decision.

title: Raja
subTitle: Raju and Madhu are forced apart by the latter's elder brothers, leading to increased distance between the two.

title: Jamai Raja
subTitle: When the wealthy Durgeshwari's daughter falls in love with Raja, a poor boy, she reluctantly agrees to their union. However, she constantly tries to sabotage their relationship, but Raja outwits her.

title: Ghar Ek Mandir
subTitle: Brothers Prem, Vijay and Ravi are happy, but their lives change when Prem gets killed. Ravi must save his family from an evil man, Dharampal, while Vijay is preoccupied with Sapna.
